blended.narrative: Schweitzer is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.6 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 1,842 ft.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 2.5" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Base has been melting — down 6" over the past week. Current depth: 48".
